prompt: Реалізуй rate limiting middleware для RAG API — максимум 100 запитів на хвилину на IP

assertions.text: Calls context_briefing before any code changes
Calls review_code or check_architecture after writing code
Calls remember or record_adr to capture the decision
Implementation plan lists specific files to modify with rationale
Plan includes blast radius section identifying dependent files
Written code implements rate limiting logic (contains IP tracking and request counting)
